name: Young and Beautiful
overview: In 2008, 19-year-old Liu Wenjing leaves her mountain village for Shanghai to pursue a better life. Faced with financial hardship, family illness, and personal setbacks, she navigates love, loss, and betrayal. With the support of her friends, she finds the strength to start over and chase a new beginning.

trailers.title: Young and Beautiful | Trailer | Zhang Tianai & Xu Kaicheng start a sweet love! | 我的漂亮朋友 | ENG SUB
